name: EXPRESS - TAKINI LTM

violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CFSM is expired.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -2 cases of food on the floor in the Kitchen walk in freezer. *COS-put away on shelves while on-site.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — ---Hot hold items were not time stamped and log was not filled out for today. *Staff stated items are changed out throughout day, approximately every 3 hours. Breakfast stated as put out at sandwiches put out at 7am and Breakfast burritos stated as put out at 8am.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Items were stated as mis-dated/not redated. Multiple items in make table had dates of 03/25 to 4/21. -Frozen grab n go items are not dated for thaw date (i.e. Deli Express, Badlands, Tielkes, Cheesecakes, etc.).

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. -Single-use container without handle left in shredded cheese at pizza prep table to be used as scoop.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Make table has ice build up around top rail. -Food debris/residue at lids of containers in make table (old dates on lids, lids from previous use). -Debris at bottom and back edges of ice chute.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -2 cases of single use items stored on floor in dry storage area. (Storage area is disorderly.)--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use coffee cups and lids are stored on counter top at coffee pot.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink at kitchen entry is not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris/residue below fryers. -Residue at swing doors to back room.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Using cloths at drain boards of the dish pit.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Multiple cabinets below beverage station are moisture damaged/stained.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CSFM is expired.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Cases of food on the floor in the walk in freezer. -Sleeve of bagged flour stored on the floor of dry storage area.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Single-use container without handle left in shredded cheese at pizza prep table.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — ---Hot hold fryer items were not time stamped and log was not filled out for today. *Staff stated items are changed out throughout day, approximately every 3 hours.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open bags of pizza table meats are not date marked--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Nacho Cheese in walk in cooler dated 09/30. COS-Staff disposed of while on-site.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris at ice chute of soda machine.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Sanitizer at dish pit was empty, directed staff to restock. *Verified unit was working before departure.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Could not locate test strips while on-site. *Facility is using Ecolab sink and surface sanitizer.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of cups stored on floor in dry storage area. -Sleeve of Styrofoam plates on floor in dry storage area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Pizza flats on top shelf in kitchen are not stored inverted.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Kitchen walk in cooler fans drain line is leaking into a container on the top shelf (catch container is nearly full).
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink at kitchen entry is not working.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -No paper towels stocked at hand sink near pizza table--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. -No trash can available in kitchen upon arrival. *COS-staff returned trash can to kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Build up of debris below 3 comp sink. -Trash/debris in corner of dry storage area. (Dry storage in general disarray). -Kitchen walk in cooler has strong odor, debris on floor and is due for a deep clean.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Unlabeled spray bottle with blue chemical on storage shelf in kitchen. ** Corrected on site--Unapproved poison or toxic material was observed in food establishment. -Lysol Hydrogen cleaner on shelf in kitchen with clean dishes. -Removed from kitchen area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)

source_address: 19105 SD HWY 34 - E CHERRY RD, Howes
